hypothesis: Compared to single-stage DPO, a curriculum DPO that sequentially emphasizes (i) coexistence, (ii) BCC-first solidification, (iii) suppression of non-BCC/B2 phases, and (iv) lattice mismatch will increase the fraction of generated alloys satisfying the B2-at-373K criterion by at least 15 percentage points while maintaining coverage recall ≥0.95.
